alerts.headline: Frost Advisory issued April 25 at 10:02AM PDT until April 26 at 10:00AM PDT by NWS Seattle WA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Temperatures as low as 32 degrees will result in frost
formation.

* WHERE...Southern Hood Canal, City of Seattle, Lowlands of Lewis
and Southern Thurston Counties, Lowlands of Pierce and Southern
King Counties, and Olympia and Southern Puget Sound.

* WHEN...From 11 PM this evening to 10 AM PDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Frost could harm sensitive outdoor vegetation. Sensitive
outdoor plants may be killed if left uncovered.
alerts.instruction: Take steps now to protect tender plants from the cold.
